title: schoenocaulon jaliscense var. regulare
intro: Schoenocaulon jaliscense var. regulare is a variety of the Schoenocaulon jaliscense plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schoenocaulon jaliscense var. regulare are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it a popular remedy for coughs, colds, and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions and infusions, which are often used to make teas, tonics, and syrups to support respiratory health.
